member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authentication.IdentityServiceTests
member.summary: Verifies authentication, refresh-token lifecycle, replay protection, and JWT claims.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authentication.IdentityServiceTests.LoginAsync_WithValidCredentials_IssuesTokenPair
member.summary: Verifies that valid credentials issue and persist a token pair.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authentication.IdentityServiceTests.LoginAsync_WithInvalidCredentials_ReturnsInvalidCredentials
member.summary: Verifies that invalid credentials return a stable non-disclosing failure.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authentication.IdentityServiceTests.LoginAsync_WithLockedUser_ReturnsUserLocked
member.summary: Verifies that a locked user with valid credentials receives the locked-user failure.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authentication.IdentityServiceTests.LoginAsync_PersistsOnlyRefreshTokenHash
member.summary: Verifies that persistence contains only a hash and never the raw refresh token.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authentication.IdentityServiceTests.RefreshAsync_WithActiveToken_RotatesToken
member.summary: Verifies successful refresh-token rotation and replacement linkage.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authentication.IdentityServiceTests.RefreshAsync_WithRotatedToken_ReturnsReplayDetected
member.summary: Verifies that the previous token cannot be used after successful rotation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authentication.IdentityServiceTests.RefreshAsync_WhenReplayDetected_RevokesActiveTokens
member.summary: Verifies that replay detection revokes the user's replacement token.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authentication.IdentityServiceTests.RefreshAsync_WithExpiredToken_ReturnsExpiredFailure
member.summary: Verifies that expired refresh tokens are rejected and revoked.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authentication.IdentityServiceTests.RevokeAsync_WhenRepeated_RemainsSuccessful
member.summary: Verifies that revocation succeeds repeatedly without revealing token existence.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authentication.IdentityServiceTests.RefreshAsync_WithSameTokenTwice_OnlyFirstRotationSucceeds
member.summary: Verifies that the same token can produce at most one successful rotation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authentication.IdentityServiceTests.LoginAsync_GeneratedJwtContainsRequiredClaims
member.summary: Verifies that generated JWTs contain every required authentication claim.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authorization.ApplicationRolesTests
member.summary: Verifies the immutable application role allowlist.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authorization.ApplicationRolesTests.IsValid_AcceptsOnlyApplicationRoles
member.summary: Verifies that only the three supported role names are accepted.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authorization.AuthorizationEndpointExtensionsTests
member.summary: Verifies the strongly named Minimal API authorization conventions.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authorization.AuthorizationEndpointExtensionsTests.AuthorizationHelpers_AddExpectedPolicies
member.summary: Verifies that each helper adds the expected named policy metadata.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authorization.AuthorizationPolicyTests
member.summary: Verifies registration and role composition for every named authorization policy.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authorization.AuthorizationPolicyTests.AddApplicationAuthorization_RegistersExpectedPolicies
member.summary: Verifies the authenticated fallback policy and all role policies.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authorization.CurrentUserServiceTests
member.summary: Verifies claim projection and role helpers for the current authenticated principal.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authorization.CurrentUserServiceTests.AuthenticatedPrincipal_ExposesIdentityClaimsAndRoles
member.summary: Verifies that authenticated JWT claims are exposed without duplicates.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authorization.CurrentUserServiceTests.UnauthenticatedPrincipal_ExposesNoIdentityData
member.summary: Verifies that unauthenticated principals expose no current-user data.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authorization.IdentityRoleSeederTests
member.summary: Verifies idempotent role seeding and Identity role-name validation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authorization.IdentityRoleSeederTests.SeedAsync_WhenRepeated_CreatesOnlyMissingRoles
member.summary: Verifies that repeated seeding creates each supported role exactly once.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Authorization.IdentityRoleSeederTests.Identity_WithUnknownRole_RejectsCreationAndAssignment
member.summary: Verifies that Identity rejects role creation and assignment outside the allowlist.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApiClientTests
member.summary: Verifies typed course API requests and safe problem parsing.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApiClientTests.GetCoursesAsync_ConstructsSearchFilterAndPagination
member.summary: Verifies list filter and pagination query construction.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApiClientTests.CreateCourseAsync_ReturnsCreatedCourse
member.summary: Verifies successful course creation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApiClientTests.CreateCourseAsync_ParsesValidationFailure
member.summary: Verifies API validation problem parsing.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApiClientTests.CourseFormModel_RejectsMissingRequiredValues
member.summary: Verifies client-side form validation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApiClientTests.UpdateCourseAsync_SendsConcurrencyProtectedRequest
member.summary: Verifies Draft update method, route, and rowversion body.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApiClientTests.CourseActions_UseExpectedRoutes(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies lifecycle and delete API routes.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApiClientTests.UpdateCourseAsync_ParsesConcurrencyConflict
member.summary: Verifies concurrency conflict parsing.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApplicationTests
member.summary: Verifies course ownership, conflicts, state rules, and pagination.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApplicationTests.Administrator_CanCreateForInstructor
member.summary: Verifies administrator instructor assignment.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApplicationTests.InstructorCreate_IgnoresRequestedInstructor
member.summary: Verifies instructor self-assignment.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApplicationTests.Instructor_CannotViewOrEditAnotherInstructorsCourse
member.summary: Verifies instructor ownership.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApplicationTests.ListQuery_FiltersInstructorOwnedCourses
member.summary: Verifies server-side ownership filtering.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApplicationTests.DuplicateSlug_IsRejected
member.summary: Verifies duplicate slug rejection.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApplicationTests.ListQuery_Paginates
member.summary: Verifies course pagination.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApplicationTests.Publish_RequiresDraft
member.summary: Verifies publication state requirements.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApplicationTests.Archive_RequiresPublished
member.summary: Verifies archival state requirements.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApplicationTests.Update_MapsRowVersionConflict
member.summary: Verifies concurrency result mapping.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseApplicationTests.Student_IsForbidden
member.summary: Verifies Student denial.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseDomainTests
member.summary: Verifies course aggregate lifecycle rules.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseDomainTests.Create_NormalizesValuesAndStartsDraft
member.summary: Verifies normalized Draft creation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseDomainTests.DraftCourse_CanBeUpdated
member.summary: Verifies Draft editing.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseDomainTests.PublishedCourse_CannotBeEdited
member.summary: Verifies Published edit protection.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseDomainTests.DraftCourse_CanBePublished
member.summary: Verifies Draft publication.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseDomainTests.PublishedCourse_CanBeArchived
member.summary: Verifies Published archival.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseDomainTests.DraftCourse_CanBePreparedForSoftDeletion
member.summary: Verifies Draft deletion preparation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseDomainTests.DraftCourse_CannotBeArchived
member.summary: Verifies Draft archive rejection.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Courses.CourseDomainTests.ArchivedCourse_CannotReturnToPublished
member.summary: Verifies Archived publication rejection.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollInCourseCommandHandlerTests
member.summary: Verifies employee enrollment application rules.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollInCourseCommandHandlerTests.Handle_PublishedCourse_UsesCurrentUserAndPersists
member.summary: Verifies successful enrollment.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollInCourseCommandHandlerTests.Handle_DraftCourse_ReturnsCourseNotPublished
member.summary: Verifies draft rejection.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollInCourseCommandHandlerTests.Handle_ArchivedCourse_ReturnsCourseNotPublished
member.summary: Verifies archived courses cannot receive new enrollments.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollInCourseCommandHandlerTests.Handle_DuplicateActiveEnrollment_ReturnsConflict
member.summary: Verifies duplicate rejection.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApiClientTests
member.summary: Verifies authenticated enrollment API request construction.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApiClientTests.GetMyEnrollmentsAsync_ConstructsFiltersAndPagination
member.summary: Verifies My Learning filter and pagination parameters.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApiClientTests.GetCourseEnrollmentsAsync_ConstructsFiltersAndPagination
member.summary: Verifies course enrollment administration parameters.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApplicationQueryTests
member.summary: Verifies enrollment ownership, withdrawal, and student-safe projections.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApplicationQueryTests.Withdraw_OwnedActiveEnrollment_Succeeds
member.summary: Verifies an owner can withdraw an active enrollment.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApplicationQueryTests.Withdraw_CompletedEnrollment_ReturnsInvalidState
member.summary: Verifies completed enrollment withdrawal is rejected.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApplicationQueryTests.Withdraw_ForeignEnrollment_ReturnsForbidden
member.summary: Verifies a different student cannot withdraw an enrollment.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApplicationQueryTests.Withdraw_Administrator_CanWithdrawAnotherStudentsEnrollment
member.summary: Verifies administrators can withdraw another student's active enrollment.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApplicationQueryTests.EnrollmentDetails_ForeignStudent_ReturnsForbidden
member.summary: Verifies enrollment details enforce ownership.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApplicationQueryTests.Catalog_ReturnsPublishedCoursesOnly
member.summary: Verifies the catalog requests and returns published courses only.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApplicationQueryTests.Catalog_IncludesCurrentStudentsEnrollmentState
member.summary: Verifies catalog cards contain the current student's enrollment state.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApplicationQueryTests.MyLearning_UsesCurrentStudentAndHidesUnpublishedCourses
member.summary: Verifies My Learning is scoped to the current user and published content.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentApplicationQueryTests.CourseEnrollments_NonOwningInstructor_ReturnsForbidden
member.summary: Verifies a non-owning instructor cannot list course enrollments.

member.summary: Verifies enrollment lifecycle invariants.

member.summary: Verifies initial state.

member.summary: Verifies starting.

member.summary: Verifies completion from active states.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentDomainTests.Withdraw_FromActiveState_Succeeds(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Verifies withdrawal from active states.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentDomainTests.Completed_CannotBeWithdrawn
member.summary: Verifies completed enrollment immutability.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.EnrollmentDomainTests.Withdrawn_CannotBeRestarted
member.summary: Verifies withdrawn enrollments cannot restart.

member.summary: Verifies catalog-facing lesson projections exclude unpublished content.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Enrollments.PublishedLessonProjectionTests.GetPublishedByCourseAsync_ExcludesDraftLessons
member.summary: Verifies published lesson retrieval does not include draft lessons.

member.summary: Verifies lesson progress lifecycle invariants.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Learning.LessonProgressDomainTests.Start_CreatesInProgressProgress
member.summary: Verifies first access creates in-progress state.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Learning.LessonProgressDomainTests.Access_UpdatesLastAccessedAtUtc
member.summary: Verifies repeated access updates access time.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Learning.LessonProgressDomainTests.Complete_IsIdempotentAndAccessDoesNotRegress
member.summary: Verifies completion is idempotent and cannot regress.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.Learning.LessonProgressDomainTests.Start_RejectsNonUtcTimestamp
member.summary: Verifies domain timestamps reject non-UTC values.

member.summary: Verifies the essential Identity-backed administrator user-management behavior.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.UserManagement.UserManagementServiceTests.GetUsersAsync_WithSearch_ReturnsRequestedPage
member.summary: Verifies filtered pagination and the maximum page-size rule.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.UserManagement.UserManagementServiceTests.GetUserByIdAsync_WithUnknownUser_ReturnsNotFound
member.summary: Verifies the stable not-found Result for an unknown user.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.UserManagement.UserManagementServiceTests.SetEnabledAsync_ChangesEnabledState
member.summary: Verifies that a user can be disabled and enabled again.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.UserManagement.UserManagementServiceTests.AssignRoleAsync_WithValidRole_AddsRole
member.summary: Verifies additive assignment of one valid application role.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.UserManagement.UserManagementServiceTests.AssignRoleAsync_WithInvalidRole_ReturnsValidationFailure
member.summary: Verifies that roles outside the application allowlist are rejected.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Infrastructure.Tests.UserManagement.UserManagementServiceTests.AssignRoleAsync_WithExistingRole_RemainsIdempotent
member.summary: Verifies that repeated assignment does not create duplicate user roles.
